data.content: Shipment review approved. All changes merged to main (merge 9c9340b340d6, impl 2d4b8fc379ee). CI green — both CI and Coverage Badge workflows passed. Tests: 165 files, 2237 passed. Code verified: rolling last-24h filter, combined all-steps series, per-step leaderboard helpers all present and tested. No invariants to check. No regressions detected.
